# Why bigger context windows still need RAG

## Summary

## Key Points
- Models with 1M+ context still degrade on needle-in-haystack at long distances
- Retrieval scoping reduces cost per inference dramatically
- Hybrid lexical + vector retrieval wins on real corpora
